content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram Weekly Report (Apr 5 - 11, 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the week of April 5–11, 2026, was focused on refining the user interface within the Telegram plugin. The primary objective was to improve the visual presentation of chat elements, specifically targeting display name formatting to enhance the overall user experience.

## 🛠️ Key Developments
### UI/UX Improvements
The development effort this week centered on optimizing the Telegram interface for better readability and layout consistency.
*   **Chat Display Formatting:** Work was initiated to refine the presentation of chat display names. This effort is captured in pull request [#26](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/26), which aims to narrow the display names to improve the interface's visual layout.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this reporting period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there are currently no active issues recorded for this timeframe.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
The project saw focused activity regarding UI/UX refinement. The primary contribution for the week was the submission of PR [#26](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/26), indicating a targeted approach to improving the plugin's front-end presentation. No other community discussions or collaborative threads were recorded during this period.
